# vendomat — shared external constraints (Face B, rollout slice 2)
#
# The unified version pins the personal *man-family libs reference, so they all pin the *same*
# external versions (DESIGN §7.3). This is the backbone the knowledge layer hangs on: every skill
# is "the <lib> <pin> skill", and that pin is the concrete trigger for review-on-bump (§7.5).
#
# Format: one pip-style `name==version` per line; comments with `#`. Each line MUST stay in lockstep
# with the matching `vendor/libs/<lib>/meta.toml` `[lib].pin` — `vendomat doctor`'s `vendor:constraints`
# check warns when they diverge. When you rewrite a skill against a new version, bump both together.
#
# NOTE: cross-repo coupling is real here — a breaking bump touches every consumer at once. Adopt
# deliberately and keep the change visible via review-on-bump (`vendomat doctor`).

typer==0.12.5
